purpose: Manifest-driven local head training plan. It keeps the active v4 fallback untouched while making the learned candidate path ready for multiple privacy-safe labeled blind exports.

trainingSets.notes: Only currently available privacy-safe labeled real-browser export. More local labeled blind exports should be appended here before activation is considered.

blockedTrainingSources.reason: Sample 3 is the blind structural validation clip. It must never be used for training, labeling, or calibration.
